qa_pairs.question: How does an Academic Principal Investigator (PI) or their delegated user initiate or resume a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: An Academic Principal Investigator (PI) or their delegated user should navigate to the Resource Application page on CCDB at https://ccdb.computecanada.ca/allocation/resource_applications. From there, they should go to the 'Ongoing Competitions' tab under the 'Resource Allocation Competitions' section and click 'Apply' to start a new application or 'Edit' to continue an existing one in the corresponding RRG or RPP section.

qa_pairs.question: Where in the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application form can an Academic Principal Investigator (PI) locate the Canadian Common CV section?
qa_pairs.answer: Within the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application form on CCDB, an Academic Principal Investigator (PI) should scroll down to find the 'Canadian Common CV' section.
